name: Beef with Yogurt in Pita Bread (Fetes Vodines SE Peta)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Peeled, seeded and diced cucumber
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
Combine wine, olive oil, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Cut steak into strips, approximately 2-inches by 1/4-inch wide. Pour marinade over beef strips and let stand for 1 hour at room temperature. Drain meat strips and cook in two batches in hot butter, stirring until brown on all sides, about 2 to 3 minutes per batch. Serve meat in a chafing dish or on a hot tray to keep warm. Open one end of pita bread to make a pocket. Set out dishes of lettuce, tomato, cucumber, and yogurt for guests to fill their own pitas.
